A mid-point stop when traveling to Buenos Aires. It's a shame the buffet won't be open later at night.

reviews.comment:
rica comida pero precios muy exorbitantes, más allá de ser una YPF de ruta y tener un sobre precio me parecieron demasiado caros. Igualmente muy buena variedad de comida y calidad de los productos aunque no valen ese precio.

(Translated by Google)
The food was good, but the prices were exorbitant. Even though it's a roadside YPF station and they're overpriced, I found them excessively expensive. However, the variety of food and the quality of the products were very good, though not worth the price.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPbHZIQ2J3EAE
